display.purpose: Hero headlines and every section H2; mixes roman and italic-rosegold within one line for emphasis.

body.purpose: All paragraph copy; calm, low-contrast counterweight to Playfair Display.

label.purpose: Small uppercase tracked section labels and button text, always copper or ivory.

shadows.name: card-hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Desktop services card hover only; never present at rest.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for hovers, card lifts, slider drag.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition length for hover state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Ink-filled CTA with an uppercase tracked label; on hover a rosegold-to-copper gradient slides up from the bottom edge.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: #1C1815; color: #FBF8F4; padding: 16px 36px; font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .28em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color .45s; } .ds-btn-primary span { position: relative; z-index: 2; } .ds-btn-primary::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(120deg, #B76E79, #B06A4A); transform: translateY(101%); transition: transform .5s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover::before { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B76E79; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent button for use over photographic hero backgrounds.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(251,248,244,.6); padding: 16px 36px; font-size: .72rem; letter-spacing: .28em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: .45s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(251,248,244,.12); border-color: #fff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Service Row (mobile editorial list)
components.description: Numbered list row replacing the boxed-card pattern on mobile: index number, title, description, thin bottom divider, no icon circle, no shadow.
components.html:
02

Balayage

Iluminaciones naturales con dimensión y movimiento.
components.css: .ds-svc-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(28,24,21,.1); padding: 1rem 0.25rem; } .ds-svc-num { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: .75rem; color: rgba(176,106,74,.5); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-svc-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: 1.125rem; margin-bottom: .125rem; color: #1C1815; } .ds-svc-desc { color: rgba(28,24,21,.55); font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.4; }

components.name: Before/After Slider
components.description: Draggable comparison slider: vertical white handle with a circular grip, the page's one embrace of tactile, content-driven interactivity.
components.css: .ds-ba-wrap { position: relative; width: 240px; height: 160px; overflow: hidden; background: #E4D5C3; } .ds-ba-handle { position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; left: 50%; width: 2px; background: #fff; transform: translateX(-50%); } .ds-ba-grip { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%,-50%); width: 54px; height: 54px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.92); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.25); color: #1C1815; cursor: grab; }

components.name: Nav Link (underline)
components.description: Manrope nav link that grows a rosegold underline left-to-right on hover.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position: relative; color: #1C1815; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: -3px; height: 1px; width: 0; background: #B76E79; transition: width .4s; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after, .ds-nav-link:focus-visible::after { width: 100%; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #B76E79; outline-offset: 4px; }

narrative.overview: The site reads like a boutique beauty atelier bathed in soft gold-hour light, not a software product. Every surface is a warm ivory or sand, every accent a muted rosegold or copper, every headline set in Playfair Display so the page feels hand-curated rather than templated. Density is generous: sections breathe with large vertical rhythm, and the page never rushes the visitor toward a CTA grid. This system explicitly rejects the SaaS-template register: no identical icon-in-circle card grids repeated past their useful count, no scroll-fade-in applied uniformly to every section just because GSAP is loaded, no stock-photo Instagram walls, no hero-metric blocks, no side-stripe borders or gradient text.
keyCharacteristics: Warm ivory/sand backgrounds, never pure white or pure black
Playfair Display serif for all headlines, italic rosegold accents for emphasis words
Thin rosegold borders (≤1px, 10-15% opacity) instead of shadows as the default separator
Editorial list rhythm on mobile (numbered rows + dividers) instead of stacked boxed cards
Motion is occasional and purposeful, not a default applied to every section

rules.name: The Rare Accent Rule
rules.body: Rosegold and copper are accents, not backgrounds. They never fill a surface larger than a thin border, icon, or short text run.

rules.name: The Whisper Label Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked labels are always small (0.72rem) and wide-tracked (0.32em); they introduce a section, never compete with the headline that follows.

rules.name: The Hover-Only Shadow Rule
rules.body: No element carries a shadow at rest. Shadows are a state response to hover/focus, copper-tinted, never neutral gray.

dos: Do keep all corners square except the fully-round elements (nav buttons, icon badges, slider grip).
Do use Playfair Display for every headline and Manrope for every paragraph.
Do treat rosegold/copper as accents on ≤10-15% of any given section's surface.
Do use the editorial list pattern for repeated content on mobile.
Do animate only where it clarifies real content or signals state.
donts: Don't add identical icon-in-circle card grids repeated past 3-4 items.
Don't apply a uniform scroll-fade-in to every section by default.
Don't use stock-photo grids like a generic Instagram wall.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe borders, glassmorphism beyond the nav, or hero-metric blocks.
Don't let rosegold/copper become a background fill on anything larger than a thin border, icon, or short text run.
Don't mix in a second display typeface or a rounded-corner system.
